verdict.summary: Round 1's major completeness defect is resolved. The regression guard now checks both stale origins across site/src, and the remaining generated-data reference was migrated to github.com/sparq-org/sparq. A checkout-wide scan of site/src finds neither stale pattern. The exclusions are narrow, documented sibling-owned paths; neither currently contains a stale origin at the PR head. The test exercises the real filesystem tree and reports file, line, and matched origin, so it is non-vacuous and appropriately guards the claimed scope.
